uiBuilder.label: Quote Options Action Bar
uiBuilder.description: Action bar for quote options: Select All + selected count, Approve Selected and Share to Broker (enabled when 1+ selected), and an always-on Generate New Option. Holds the selection and emits events. Composes now-button + now-icon.

properties.name: options
properties.label: Quote options
properties.description: The quote options. An object with an `items` array of { id, label }. The count shows X of items.length; Select All selects all their ids. (Object-wrapped — a bare top-level array default breaks the production build.)

properties.name: selectedIds
properties.label: Selected ids
properties.description: Initial / externally-bound selection. An object with an `ids` array. Select All updates the selection internally from here.

properties.name: showCount
properties.label: Show selected count
properties.description: When on, shows "X of N selected" next to Select All.

properties.name: deselectAllLabel
properties.label: Deselect All label
properties.description: Label shown on the select-all button when everything is already selected (toggles to clear). Set equal to Select All label to keep it constant.

properties.name: approveLabel
properties.label: Approve button label
properties.description: Label for the Approve Selected action.

properties.name: shareLabel
properties.label: Share button label
properties.description: Label for the Share to Broker action.

properties.name: generateLabel
properties.label: Generate button label
properties.description: Label for the always-enabled Generate New Option action.

properties.name: approveIcon
properties.label: Approve icon
properties.description: now-icon name for the Approve Selected button. Leave empty for no icon.

properties.name: shareIcon
properties.label: Share icon
properties.description: now-icon name for the Share to Broker button. Leave empty for no icon.

properties.name: generateIcon
properties.label: Generate icon
properties.description: now-icon name for the Generate New Option button. Leave empty for no icon.

actions.name: SELECTION_CHANGED
actions.label: Selection changed
actions.description: Fired when Select All toggles the selection. Payload: { selected:[ids], count }.

actions.name: APPROVE_SELECTED
actions.label: Approve selected
actions.description: Fired when Approve Selected is clicked (only when 1+ selected). Payload: { selected:[ids] }.

payload.name: selected
payload.label: Selected ids
payload.description: Array of selected option ids to approve.

actions.name: SHARE_TO_BROKER
actions.label: Share to broker
actions.description: Fired when Share to Broker is clicked (only when 1+ selected). Payload: { selected:[ids] }.

payload.name: selected
payload.label: Selected ids
payload.description: Array of selected option ids to share.

actions.name: GENERATE_NEW_OPTION
actions.label: Generate new option
actions.description: Fired when Generate New Option is clicked (always enabled).
